def encode_url(url):
    """Simple URL encoding for special characters."""
    result = url
    # Must encode % first to avoid ambiguity
    result = result.replace("%", "%25")
    # Then encode other special characters
    replacements = {
        " ": "%20",
        "&": "%26",
        "=": "%3D",
        "?": "%3F",
        "#": "%23",
    }

def encode_url(url):
    """Simple URL encoding for special characters."""
    result = url
    # Encode % first to prevent double-encoding issues
    result = result.replace("%", "%25")

    replacements = {
        " ": "%20",
        "&": "%26",
        "=": "%3D",
        "?": "%3F",
        "#": "%23",
    }
    for char, encoded in replacements.items():
        result = result.replace(char, encoded)
    return result
